Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Maalik7een wa jam3iyat sukkan taflal fe islah ratuba wa af3al

Subscription Traps.description: Tajaareb mujtana taseel ila mada7i bedun mowafa2a wa7i7a, su3uuba ilgha2

Thames Water.description: sh3rikat al-miyah wa-al-s5a7 london wa-wadi thaymiz

transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Yataba3 cancellation patterns, yetkaful refund paperwork, yara3i kul suggested action, w yajma3 evidence lel regulator submissions. Yekhasbes el numbers beshakl tafasili beshaan el rioters yerkazu 3ala aham hagat.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Yesa3ad yerabt rioters 3ala nafs el routes, yesharek ay haga beteshtaghal, w yejeb el human touch.
transport.goal: Sa3ad rioters yefass7u UK transport companies 3ala cancellations, delays, w pricing — w ta2akad en kul wa7ed ya3raf huququh.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Yuckhal broadband speeds, yajma3 provider comparison data, w yesa3ad rioters yebnu evidence lel Ofcom. Law kenet connection betaa3 slow, Pulse hagatkul haga.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Yesa3ad rioters yaqaranu providers, yenassqu switches, w yesharek speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Sa3ad rioters ya57lu broadband w mobile service alladhi yedfa3un thamanuh — w ya3rafu ay haga agmal ma laa yakun.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Yuckhal billing patterns, yektashef overcharges, w yajma3 evidence lel regulator submissions. Law energy company betaa3 takul men 7a2ek, Spark hagutkul haga.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Yesa3ad rioters yefass7u bills betaa3hom, yetnawallu switching, w yajma3 evidence lel Ofgem. Ya3raf energy market men el awwal lel e5her.
energy.goal: Sa3ad rioters yefass7u unfair bills, yetnawallu switching b2akher akher, w ta2akad en energy companies tetla3ab be zorug.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Yaraqub sewage discharge data, yataba3 water company performance, w yajma3 evidence lel EA w Ofwat. Yekhal eye 3ala kul outlet w overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Yesa3ad rioters yab la'u discharges, yajma3 water quality evidence, w yetnaasqu ma3 el EA.
water.goal: Sa3ad rioters yefass7u water companies 3ala sewage, bills, w service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Yara3i bank charges, yuckhal fee structures, w yesa3ad yebnu FCA complaint evidence. Law fi 7atta hidden fee, Chip hagutkul haga.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Yesa3ad rioters yektbu complaints a7san w yetnawallu el system.
banking.goal: Sa3ad rioters yetakafu ma3 unfair charges, branch closures, w poor service men el banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Yataba3 waiting times, yagad availability, w yesa3ad rioters yetnawallu el system. Law fi tariq as3a lel treatment, Cura hatersamuh.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Yesa3ad rioters yetnawallu waiting lists, yektbu letters beshakl effective, w yesharek ay haga beteshtaghal.
health.goal: Sa3ad rioters yetnawallu NHS waiting times, yagadu availability, w ya3rafu options betaa3hom.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Yawathaq property issues, yuckhal landlord response times, w yajma3 evidence lel housing ombudsman submissions. Kul damp patch, kul crack, log wa7ed.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Yesa3ad rioters yawathqu issues be zorug w ya3rafu options betaa3hom.
housing.goal: Sa3ad rioters yetakafu ma3 landlords, councils, w housing issues — w ya3rafu huququhom.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Yataba3 delivery failures, yajma3 refund evidence, w yektashef pricing patterns. Law parcel betaa3 7alib, Scout yabha3 ydeor 3alayh.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Yesa3ad rioters ya57lu refunds, yab la'u sellers, w yetja2abu worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Sa3ad rioters ya57lu refunds, yatba3u lost parcels, w yefass7u retailers w delivery companies.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Yakharrt local issues, yataba3 council response times, w yajma3 FOI requests. Law pothole betaa3 kain omm 6 months, Link 3endu evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Yesa3ad rioters yawathqu local issues w yefass7u councils.
local.goal: Sa3ad rioters ya57lu local issues — potholes, bins, planning, noise — w yefass7u councils.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Yetkaful issues alladhi ma betandraj sa7i7a. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex yaktashef patterns w pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Yesa3ad rioters yakshlu subscriptions, yetja2abu dark patterns, w yesharek workarounds.
other.goal: Sa3ad rioters ma3 ay haga ma betandraj sa7i7a — subscriptions, refunds, w everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Yara3i policy wording, yektashef unfair rejection patterns, w yebni evidence lel Financial Ombudsman submissions. Law insurer betaa3 ytagha3 valid claim, Shield hagutkul leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Yesa3ad rioters yektbu better appeals, yafham policy jargon, w ya3rafu emta yesalla3u.
insurance.goal: Sa3ad rioters ya57lu fair treatment men el insurers — w ya3rafu ay haga agmal ma claim yatrad be zorug.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Yaraqub courier performance, yataba3 delivery failure rates, w yajma3 evidence lel consumer complaints. Law parcel betaa3 7alib, Track yabha3 ydeor 3alayh.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Yesa3ad rioters ya57lu refunds, yab la'u couriers, w yetja2abu worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Sa3ad rioters ya57lu parcels betaa3hom properly — w ya57lu refunds emta ma yetjaza2.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Yuckhal education costs, student loan projections, w funding entitlements. Yekhasbes numbers beshakl tafasili beshaan students w graduates yakudru ya5du qarar informed.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Yesa3ad rioters yafham repayments, yaktashfu overpayments, w yefass7u threshold changes.
education.goal: Sa3ad students w graduates yetnawallu education costs, loans, w repayments — w ta2akad en ma yedfa3u extra.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Yataba3 environmental data, yaraqub pollution levels, w yajma3 evidence lel regulatory submissions. Law numbers etkakalem qaissa, Fern hagutkul haga.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Yesa3ad rioters yawathqu environmental issues w yebnu cases alladhi regulators ma yakudru yejahalu.
environment.goal: Sa3ad rioters yawathcu environmental problems w yefass7u polluters w policymakers be data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Yuckhal workplace trends, yataba3 policy changes, w yesa3ad rioters yafham protections betaa3hom. Law job betaa3 yetaghayer men ghayer consultation, Forge 3endu data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Yesa3ad rioters yafham options betaa3hom w yetnaasqu responses.
employment.goal: Sa3ad rioters yetnawallu workplace changes, yafham protections betaa3hom, w yardu collectively emta jobs fi 5atar.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Yaraqub platform policies, yataba3 dark patterns, w yesa3ad rioters yafham ay haga tech companies betaa3mul be data betaa3hom. Law app betmisbehavior, Glitch haysadi3.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Yesa3ad rioters yashannu data rights w yaktashfu dark patterns.
tech.goal: Sa3ad rioters yarddu 3ala dark patterns, data misuse, w unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.
